BDRY
Dry Bulk Shipping
May 10, 2022
Breakwave Dry Futures Index: 3,249 Baltic Dry Index (spot): 2,831 Short-term Indicators:
↑ 30D: 18.8% ↑ 30D: 37.8% Momentum: Positive
↑ YTD: 56.1% ↑ YTD: 27.7% Sentiment: Positive
↑ YOY: 2.9% ↓ YOY: -11.1% Fundamentals: Positive
Bi-Weekly Report
• Dry bulk defies global market rout - The Capesize market has finally showed signs of strength, with spot rates
doubling over the past few weeks, catching up to what in hindsight was an accurate futures market versus one that
at that time seemed way too optimistic. With all major dry bulk segments earning rates in the high-20,000 range,
dry bulk is currently thriving relative to a macro backdrop of recessionary fears and gloomy growth forecasts. Indeed,
dry bulk is proving to be a non-correlated, safe heaven sector in a rather synchronous drop i
